content: Hello! I'm Suver. I'm native russian and also know english. I have experience in translating anime, comics, songs, games, books. I will be glad to use my skills to improve the Russian language in the game^^I know Morimenson since its release and I am very happy to help this wonderful game. I hope we'll get along^^

Hello! <a:kyuuwave:544653198229635073> 
You can call me Nauravale or just Val.

Working from home as an artist ( just recently made my first fanart of Morimens <:jenkin_processing:1408324289115062333>  ) and I am currently working for the translation of another gacha mobile game, I also used to help translate mangas.

Currently working on translating, proofreading and testing for the French translation 🇫🇷
Hi, I'm El! I'm professional EN->RU and JP->RU translator. Have some knowledge of Chinese. Reporting for duty!
